mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert_message (user_id, alert_id, alert_name, content, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{alertId}, #{alertName}, #{content}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM alert_message WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE alert_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
